CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-27-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff PRECILA BALABBO's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order and judgment are signed. (See scanned documents for details)
